pageSubtitle: Under three minutes from signup to your first deploy answer.
createWorkspaceBody: SequrAI uses your workspace to organize projects and Production Reviews.
createWorkspaceHint: One quick step before your first Production Verdict.
connectGitHubBody: Choose the repository you want SequrAI to review before deployment.
scopesDetail: SequrAI requests read access to your repositories and webhook permissions to review code on push. SequrAI never modifies your code or deploys your application.
chooseProjectSubtitle: Choose the AI-built application you want to prepare for production.
projectResolveFailed: Repository connected but project could not be resolved.
noReposBody: Create or connect a GitHub repository to receive your first Production Verdict.
reviewBuilding: SequrAI is running your first Production Review.
reviewFailedTitle: We couldn't complete this Production Review
reviewFailedBody: Your repository is safe. No changes were made. Try the review again.
verdictBuildingHint: This is the moment of truth.
verdictContinueHint: You'll land on your project with the full verdict and next action.
criticalHighSummary: {critical} critical and {high} high deployment risks found.
readyNoBlockers: SequrAI did not find any critical blockers in this review.
dashboardReadyBody: SequrAI will keep reviewing your application as it evolves. Ask before every deploy.
blockersIntro_one: Your latest review introduced {count} production blocker.
blockersIntro_other: Your latest review introduced {count} production blockers.
